category_sources: Official GNOME msitools page links gcab under MSI tooling and contribution resources.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gcab; official GNOME project repository and source archive use gcab.
docs_sources: Official GNOME wiki page for msitools/gcab is the best official documentation surface found and links the gcab project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNOME msitools page lists https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gcab as a contribution repository.
tags_sources: Official GNOME msitools page documents MSI inspection/build tooling and links gcab.
